summary.goal: Fix useCollection not updating ownedMongoIds on catch/release
decisions: capture CollectionEntry response from catchPokemon and update ownedMongoIds in-place, rather than refetching the full collection
also clear ownedMongoIds in releasePokemon to keep the two maps in sync

rejected_approaches.reason: Unnecessary extra round-trip; the POST response already returns the CollectionEntry with the MongoDB id
